{{Quote|Gaze into the ''oracle stone''…|A [[Unidentified Dark Lord (Great Temple)|Dark Lord of the Sith]], to Darth Sidious|<ref name="EE 2" />}}
The '''oracle stone''' was an ancient [[Sith artifact/Legends|Sith artifact]] that could be used to aid a user's clairvoyance. The powers granted by the oracle stone could be detected and countered by a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] using [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]], however.<ref name="EE 2" />

During his pilgrimage to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], the [[Cloning/Legends|reborn]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] used it to locate [[Anakin Solo]] so that he might be able to use the young child's body to [[Transfer essence|prolong his existence]].<ref name="EE 2" /> [[Lumiya]] also possessed the Oracle stone and used it to monitor events occurring across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="END" />
